snippets.description: crm_lead_stage enum gains 'done' after 'live', before 'lost' (additive, non-destructive)
new nullable revenue_cents integer column, alongside existing dealValueCents/currency
moveStageSchema gains a `done` discriminated-union branch requiring BOTH revenueCents (nonnegative int) and currency (defaulted PHP) — stricter than won's optional dealValueCents
leadUpdateSchema gains optional revenueCents/currency fields so the inline editor PATCH runs through the SAME schema + SAME canEditLead gate as every other lead edit

dedicated `else if (stage === 'done')` branch inserted BEFORE the generic clearing branch — writes stage/revenueCents/currency/lastActivityAt/updatedAt only, leaves dealValueCents/wonOrgName/signedAt/lostReason untouched

snippets.lines: history rows block, revenue_cents entry added
snippets.description: audit-trail row written for the done transition: field='revenue_cents', oldValue=existing.revenueCents, newValue=payload.revenueCents

snippets.lines: updateLead — input type + SET clause + tracked array (step 12/12b)
snippets.description: revenueCents/currency added to updateLead's forward-only input handling AND to the `tracked` history-diff array (E1) — mirrors the transaction_fee_pct/convenience_fee_pesos tuple pattern exactly, so inline revenue PATCHes are audit-logged

leadUpdateSchema.safeParse -> getLead(visibility-scoped) -> canEditLead(me, existing) -> updateLead — UNCHANGED gate order; revenueCents/currency forwarded forward-only alongside every other optional field
mirrors getWonInRangePerAe's selectDistinctOn shape but ADDS eq(crmLeads.stage, 'done') current-stage guard (E2) so a lead that later moved OUT of done is excluded from the sum
